channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter, 17th March
item.description:
Please see the photo. (This is a busy walk to/from the station).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Crescent, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in railway brixge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Breakspears Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street side gully between Eldon court and 14 Brondedbury road, 17th March
item.description:
Not draining
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti x 2 on fence belonging to 1 Little Thrift, 17th March
item.description:
Please can this graffiti be removed as soon as possible. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grey painted road sign, 17th March
item.description:
The no turning sign has been covered in grey paint
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Garrett Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Selsea place, 17th March
item.description:
Furniture dumped by bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Selsea Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in two sealed bags on pavement outside number 57, 17th March
item.description:
Having looked at Bromley Council's website for what to do with the dead fox we've found; the fox has been double-bagged and put on the pavement for collection. Thank you for your help.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Durham Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 17th March
item.description:
Lewisham Way. ‘Nuff said.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewisham Way, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting on at all hours, 17th March
item.description:
Street light outside number 9 is all constantly through the day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Woodbine Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked and uneven pavement slabs, 17th March
item.description:
The uneven pavement as seen in the pictures provided has caused my child to trip and hurt her self. Please repair as soon as possible. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More graffiti before pedestrian footbridge over the railway - Little Thrift, 17th March
item.description:
Three lots of graffiti just before the pedestrian footbridge over the railway - daubed on the fence belonging to 15 Little Thrift, which runs alongside the public footpath here. Please can this be removed as soon as possible. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti at bus stop, 17th March
item.description:
Graffiti on bus stop located on Hurst road bus stop D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Several (7-8) lots of graffiti on fence adjacent to public footpath Little Thrift, 17th March
item.description:
Several lots of graffiti ranging in size from smallish tags to large ‘artistic’ renditions on fence belonging to 15 Little Thrift which borders the public footpath here. Please can these be removed as soon as possible. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on fence and sub station public footpath next to 15 Little Thrift, 17th March
item.description:
Several lots of graffiti- one on electric sub station fence and two on fence opposite belonging to 15 Little Thrift.. Please can this be removed as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black cable hanging down from the top of utility pole, 17th March
item.description:
Utility pole on the pavement between 42-44 Faraday Road houses has, what looks like, a black cable hanging down from the top. It's on eye level and can potentially harm pedestrians and motorists. I have only noticed this today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faraday Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extensive graffiti on pedestrian bridge over railway, 17th March
item.description:
Please can this be removed as soon as possible. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Railway signage in public footpath daubed with graffiti, 17th March
item.description:
Please remove as soon as possible. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tag in fence bordering public footpath, 17th March
item.description:
See photo Please can this be removed as soon as possible. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped wooden desk, 17th March
item.description:
Desk has been broken down and dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seacourt Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose pavement slab, 17th March
item.description:
I have reported it before the slap is very loose and my husband nearly fell today
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chandos Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet
